paper.title: Virtual Venues Live
paper.abstract: Virtual Venues Live (VVL) elevates the emotional impact of music to a new level, which revolutionizes the listening experience by transforming the sound to match the sound signature of celebrated audio performance spaces Offering an immersive in-cabin venue experience, as if the listeners were on location at the venue. VVL includes real- time microphone inputs, such that any sound in the car (speech, clapping, etc.) is also transported into the same virtual space - giving the users a true-to-life experience of each venue, VVL has been created to acoustically transport vehicle occupants and their favorite artists into celebrated performance spaces from around the globe, VVL is based on algorithms created by detailed and accurate measurements of famous acoustic spaces, e Genesis G90 has now three venues available: o Bang & Olufsen Home o Boston Symphony Hall-— one of the world’s top concert halls and the first built using acoustic principles. o Wembley Stadium - iconic and internationally recognized as world class stadium. ZS VIRTUALVENUES | 999 ery ee
